Key:        LU-4715
Summary:    creating enough files in a directory causes '.' to disappear
Link:       https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-4715
Type:       Bug
Priority:   Critical
Status:     Resolved
Resolution: Duplicate
Assignee:   Di Wang
Reporter:   John Hammond
Created:    Wed, 5 Mar 2014 17:30:02 +0000
Updated:    Wed, 4 Jun 2014 22:27:06 +0000
Resolved:   Thu, 1 May 2014 05:56:25 +0000
Labels:     llite
Links:      Duplicate: is duplicated by LU-4562; Duplicate: is duplicated by LU-4854; Related: is related to LU-3531

--- Description ---
2.5.56-43-ga641c6e

Using llmount.sh followed by 'ls -al /mnt/lustre' I see '.', '..', and '.lustre' as expected.

Running sanity.sh by the time I get to the mid 50s I see that '.' has disappeared.

--- Comment (di.wang, Thu, 1 May 2014 05:56:25 +0000) ---
Since it is similar issue. so the fix will be merge to LU-4603.

--- Comment (di.wang, Tue, 18 Mar 2014 08:27:07 +0000) ---
http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/9699/

--- Comment (jhammond, Wed, 5 Mar 2014 20:38:59 +0000) ---
t:~# llmount.sh
...
t:~# cd /mnt/lustre
t:lustre# mkdir d0
t:lustre# cd d0
t:d0# ls -ai
144115205255725507 .  144115188193296385 ..
t:d0# touch f{0..255}

t:d0# cd
t:~# umount /mnt/lustre
t:~# mount t@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre -t lustre -o rw,user_xattr,flock
t:~# cd /mnt/lustre
t:lustre# stat d0
  File: `d0'
